idea-plugin.name: AgentPort
idea-plugin.description:
Universal ACP (Agent Client Protocol) client for JetBrains IDEs.

Connect any ACP-compatible AI agent — Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Copilot CLI, OpenAI Codex, and more — directly inside your IDE. Agent-proposed file changes appear in the native IntelliJ diff viewer for review before being applied.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0
Initial release. Auto-detects ACP agents on PATH, streams responses in a native Swing panel, shows diffs in IntelliJ's built-in viewer, and supports per-agent path overrides in settings.
